listitem.para: What are the most common health conditions among Chinese in the United States?
What are the principle tenets of Traditional Chinese Medicine?
What are the primary Chinese languages? If an interpreter knows one of these languages and the patient speaks another Chinese language, what might the interpreter do to get the information?
Postpartum women might drink rice wine to increase lactation. What is the problem with this practice?
Your Chinese patient has been prescribed two medicines. One medicine is tid and the other is qid. Describe how you would teach your patient to take them?
What are the major religions practiced by Chinese in the United States?
What seating arrangement would you make to interview a Chinese patient?
What is meant by “saving face” among the Chinese? Give an example.
What are the principles of yin and yang? Give an example with dietary practices.
Identify some medications where metabolism is different for a patient with Chinese heritage.
